overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the vibrant countryside of Toussaint. The character traverses a forest trail, passes through a roadside tavern stall with NPCs, and continues toward a distant view of Beauclair Palace castle.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a winding dirt path through dense woodland with snow-capped mountains visible ahead

entered.detail: thick green tree canopy creating shade over the path
narrow winding dirt path with patches of grass
rustic wooden fence running alongside the left side of the path
tall mountain with snow-covered peak visible through the trees
colorful red and purple wildflowers growing along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: Walking through a densely wooded trail with lush green canopy overhead. The path is narrow and winding, bordered by wooden fences and vibrant wildflowers, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

events.description: exits dense forest canopy into bright sunlit open meadow

agents.ego_description: approaching a wooden roadside stall while walking along the dirt path through open countryside

entered.detail: wooden roadside tavern structure with canvas roof approaching in the distance
open grassy hillside with scattered trees replacing the dense forest
cream-colored canvas roof of the roadside stall becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright sunlit meadow as the forest canopy recedes. A wooden roadside stall with a canvas awning comes into view ahead, surrounded by lush grass and wildflowers with mountains in the background.

events.description: enters the covered area of the roadside tavern stall

agents.ego_description: walking through the tavern area, passing NPCs seated at wooden tables under the canopy

notable_agents.action: sitting at a wooden table drinking from a mug

entered.detail: rustic wooden picnic tables where NPCs are seated
large burlap sacks piled near the stall entrance
wooden barrels used as tables or storage under the canopy

segments.scene_description: Walking under the canvas canopy of a roadside tavern where NPCs sit at wooden tables. The space is filled with barrels, sacks of goods, and wooden crates as the character moves through the sheltered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: countryside path with distant castle view

events.description: exits the tavern canopy into open countryside revealing distant gothic castle

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past a wooden wagon and NPCs, with Beauclair Palace visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: standing near a wooden wagon examining a document or map

entered.detail: large gothic castle with multiple spires visible on the horizon
wooden cart with canvas cover parked beside the path
small canvas shelter visible to the right of the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tavern into open countryside with a stunning view of a distant gothic castle on the horizon. The character passes a wooden wagon and NPCs standing near the path, continuing along the dirt trail through the vibrant meadow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded forest trail that gradually opens into a vast, sunlit countryside. It begins by winding through a densely wooded path under a lush green canopy, bordered by wooden fences and wildflowers with snow-capped mountains looming in the distance. As the canopy recedes, the scene expands into a bright meadow where a wooden roadside stall with a canvas awning comes into view. The camera then moves under the shelter of the tavern, passing barrels, crates, and NPCs seated at wooden tables before exiting back into the open air. Finally, the path leads past a wooden wagon and idling NPCs, revealing a stunning view of a distant gothic castle on the horizon.
